about.seoDesc: The story of RESTARTSTAGE PRODUCTION — how we turned Ostrava into a cultural metropolis.
about.title: About Us
about.story1: RESTARTSTAGE PRODUCTION has been bringing the best of world entertainment to Ostrava since 2016. We started with small club events and today we fill the biggest venues in the region.
about.story2: Our mission is to transform Ostrava's industrial soul into a vibrant entertainment hub. Every concert, every festival, every show — that's our way of telling the world:
about.cooperateDesc: Interested in a partnership or want to organize your own event? Get in touch.
about.t2016d: RESTARTSTAGE PRODUCTION founded. First club events in Ostrava.
about.t2018d: First event at the Ostravar Aréna — 5,000 thrilled fans.
about.t2020d: "Ostrava from Home" series — online concerts during lockdown.
about.t2022d: Expansion to Dolní Vítkovice. First open-air festivals.
about.t2026d: The most ambitious season in history. 6 major events.
about.bio1: Ostrava born and raised. 15 years in event production.
about.bio2: The visionary behind every visual and branding.
about.bio3: Logistics genius. Handles anything under pressure.

aboutMini.title: Why Ostrava
aboutMini.description: Ostrava — the steel heart of the republic. A city where you can feel the energy in every street, every concert, every moment. We transform that energy into unforgettable experiences.
aboutMini.worldArtistsDesc: We bring the best performers from the global stage straight to Ostrava.
aboutMini.iconicVenuesDesc: From the Ostravar Aréna to the industrial Dolní Vítkovice — unique settings for unforgettable shows.
aboutMini.unforgettableDesc: Every event is carefully produced to give you more than just music.
